title: triticum ovatum var. biunciale
intro: Triticum ovatum var. biunciale, commonly known as wheat grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is known for its numerous health benefits. The medicinal properties of wheat grass include its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and ability to stimulate the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. The health benefits of wheat grass include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting energy levels, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Wheat grass can be prepared in various forms, including juice, powder, and capsules, and is often consumed fresh or dried for its medicinal and nutritional properties.
